_comment: Add your own LLM providers here without editing any Python. Each entry is an OpenAI-compatible endpoint. After editing, restart Sonario. Keys: label (shown in dropdown), base_url (must end in /v1 or equivalent), model, needs_key (true shows an API-key box), min_interval (seconds between calls; 0 for local), note (shown under the dropdown), tip (optional hover tooltip). Example entry is commented out below - copy it into "providers" and edit.

lmstudio.label: LM Studio (local)
lmstudio.note: Free & local. Start LM Studio's local server and load a model first.
